summary: Commercial QPUs, peripherals, and foundry services for quantum builders.
editor_note: The sharper quantum bet is not selling one more lab chip; it is turning QPUs into a manufacturable supply chain. QuantWare sells A-Line, D-Line, peripherals, foundry, and packaging services, and says it has shipped to 50+ customers across 20 countries. Unlike full-stack quantum computer builders, VIO is a component-platform wager: own the processor architecture other teams scale on. The risk is that the 10,000-qubit 2028 promise still has to survive physics and factory reality.
investors: Intel Capital, IQT, ETF Partners, FORWARD.one, Invest-NL Deep Tech Fund, InnovationQuarter Capital, Ground State Ventures, Graduate Ventures

product_evidence.claim: Official product positioning describes QuantWare: Commercial QPUs, peripherals, and foundry services for quantum builders.
QuantWare sells A-Line, D-Line, peripherals, foundry, and packaging services, and says it has shipped to 50+ customers across 20 countries.
